content.situation: 客户希望降低产品单价，但供应商认为当前价格已接近成本，需委婉拒绝并提出替代方案
content.speakerText: We're under serious pressure to cut costs — can you offer a lower price per unit?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们正面临巨大的成本压力，你们能提供更低的单价吗？
content.responseTemplate: I understand your position, but ___ — perhaps we could adjust the order quantity instead?

blanks.answer: at this price we're already at our limit
options: at this price we're already at our limit
we can just give you a discount
the price is fixed and non-negotiable

content.hint: 表达当前价格已无空间，但用替代方案缓和语气
content.knowledgePoint: 委婉拒绝 + 提出替代方案

content.situation: 客户提议增加订单量以换取降价，供应商考虑接受但需附加条件
content.speakerText: If we increase our order to 15,000 units, would you be willing to reduce the price?
content.speakerTextCn: 如果我们把订单增加到一万五千件，你们愿意降价吗？
content.responseTemplate: That’s a compelling proposal — ___ if you’re open to a longer-term agreement.

blanks.answer: we could offer a better rate
options: we could offer a better rate

content.hint: 表达愿意让步，但需绑定其他条件（如长期合作）

content.situation: 客户坚持要求降价，供应商需在不破坏关系的前提下说明价格合理性
content.speakerText: Other vendors are offering much cheaper — why should we choose you?
content.speakerTextCn: 其他供应商报价低很多，我们为什么要选你们？
content.responseTemplate: I appreciate you comparing options — ___ is what makes our offering stand out.

blanks.answer: the consistent quality and after-sales support
options: the consistent quality and after-sales support
our brand name is more famous

content.hint: 用价值点（非价格）解释为何价格更高，转移焦点
content.knowledgePoint: 价值主张替代价格竞争
